case_title: GAIL DISTON VS. KAH PO TSE ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE HUSING. PLAINTIFF GAIL DISTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAH PO TSE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LI HUI ZHEN IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,900.00 FILED BY DISTON, GAIL ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF TERRY MAURICE DAVIS AS TO DEFENDANT TSE, KAH PO AKA MICHAEL PO TSE ZHEN, LI HUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
